## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. Send message `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or logs if available.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04 / WSL2]
- Claude Code version: [e.g., v2.1.80]
- Bun version: [e.g., 1.2.x]
- Channel: [Telegram / Discord]
- Plugin version: [e.g., claude-plugins-official@latest]

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or log output.
